series_metadata.series_description: During the Ohio State Fair, the Bureau of Motor Vehicles has a display setup for sales and information. The Agency permits the general public to renew their vehicle registrations, driver licenses, and identification cards; also, driving abstracts (printout of individual''s driving records) are issued. The record series consists of Statement of Deposits - Form 20, Application for Driver Licenses (Deputy Registrar''s copy), Application for Identification Cards (Deputy Registrar''s copy), and Vehicle Registrations (Deputy Registrar''s copy).
